title: The Data Engineer's Business Translation Kit

seo.title: The Data Engineer's Business Translation Kit - Free
seo.description: A free framework for translating your technical work into business language. Includes a career leveling matrix showing what separates Senior from Lead.

items.alt: The Data Engineer's Business Translation Kit displayed on a tablet

items.content:
## The Data Engineer's Business Translation Kit

Your work is good. Nobody knows it.

Most data engineers are better at building pipelines than talking about them. That gap costs you more than you think. Promotions, headcount, budget, buy-in for the project you know is right. All of it depends on whether the people above you understand what you do and why it matters.

This free kit helps you:

* **Turn any technical task into a business outcome** that a CFO would repeat back.
* **Structure your updates so they drive decisions** instead of getting skimmed.
* **See exactly what separates Senior from Lead** so you know what to work on next.

Enter your email and get it instantly.

sections.title: Get the free toolkit
sections.description: Enter your email and get instant access to the Business Translation Kit.
